title: quercus lanuginosa var. erythrolepis
intro: Quercus lanuginosa var. erythrolepis, also known as the Chinese cork tree or Chinese corkbark, is a variety of the Chinese cork tree, a deciduous tree native to China. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which are attributed to its high content of flavonoids, phenolic acids, and triterpenoid saponins. The health benefits of Quercus lanuginosa var. erythrolepis include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and exhibiting potential anticancer properties. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
